message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

input.command: gh auth switch --user ryudae33 2>&1 && gh repo clone ftech-projects/weldmonitor "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/weldmonitor" 2>&1

content.text: `ftech-projects/weldmonitor` 레포가 없습니다. 정확한 레포 이름을 확인해보겠습니다.

input.command: gh repo list ftech-projects --limit 100 2>&1 | grep -i weld

content.content:
ftech-projects/WELDING_CORRECT	용접로봇 원점보정소프트웨어	private	2026-03-03T01:55:53Z
ftech-projects/WELD_MONITOR3	DSC 용접 모니터링 시스템	private	2026-02-20T01:45:53Z

toolUseResult.stdout:
ftech-projects/WELDING_CORRECT	용접로봇 원점보정소프트웨어	private	2026-03-03T01:55:53Z
ftech-projects/WELD_MONITOR3	DSC 용접 모니터링 시스템	private	2026-02-20T01:45:53Z

content.text:
두 개의 관련 레포가 있습니다:
1. **WELD_MONITOR3** — DSC 용접 모니터링 시스템
2. **WELDING_CORRECT** — 용접로봇 원점보정소프트웨어

어떤 레포를 클론할까요?
